texto: Actually he looks like a nice young man, and perhaps can't be blamed for his crass conception of women since all men think that way. I've met only one who appreciated me as a human being and even he didn't really.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Elin Wägner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Actually he looks like a nice young man, and perhaps can't be blamed for his crass conception of …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, feminism, men pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de men e women.
